target.label: token quality gates — schema validation + WCAG AA contrast + source-output sync

rationale: Gate-authoring + substrate-mutation story whose § Dev Notes → Testing standards summary (story v1.2 iter-69 bullet) explicitly defers per-AC automated coverage to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing — red-phase per-AC unit + integration harnesses: Ajv error-keyword matrix, `color-math.test.ts` with 4 OKLCH→sRGB + 2 contrast + 1 gamut-clip, diamond-DAG fixture smoke, SHA-resolver failure-mode probes, manifest-entry snapshot + anchor-regex completeness, hook-config regex + timing-budget). Story § Dev Notes:Testing-standards-summary:ground-(c)-variant-(iii) AFFIRMATIVELY DECLARES spec-declared CR-substitution for adversarial AC-behaviour coverage via `/bmad-code-review (args: '2')` Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out at iter-73. The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 1.13 substrate stage (Story 1.16 scope). **iter-70 substrate evidence is STRONGEST of all seven cumulative WAIVED precedents** (stories 1.7 + 1.8 + 1.9 + 1.10 + 1.11 + 1.12 + 1.13): Task 7 authored **THREE NEGATIVE SMOKES** that directly probe AC 1 + AC 2 + AC 3 gate fail-closed contracts at CLI-exit-code level — (1) schema-gate: delete `$type` from `color.neutral.50` → stderr JSON `{ status: 'violation', findings: [{ instancePath: '/color/neutral/50', keyword: 'required', message: "must have required property '$type'", ... }] }` + exit 1; revert → exit 0 silent. (2) contrast-gate: retune `color.status.info.fg` to `oklch(72% 0.14 230)` → stderr JSON naming `status.info.fg × status.info.bg` (ratio 2.09, threshold 4.5) + `severity.low × surface.default` (TWO pairs failing simultaneously proves pair-enumeration walks past first violation) + exit 1; revert → exit 0 silent. (3) sync-gate: retune `color.accent.500` to `oklch(51% 0.18 245)` without re-emitting → stderr JSON with unified-diff excerpts for all three target paths (`tokens.css`, `tailwind.preset.ts`, `theme.py`) + first differing byte offset + exit 1; revert + emitter re-run → exit 0 silent. Each negative smoke is a full closed-loop fail-closed verification of the corresponding AC gate contract. AC 4 + AC 5 + AC 6 substrate-verified via iter-70 quality-gate bundle: `pnpm -w typecheck` 16/16 green; `pnpm -w lint` 16/16; `pnpm -w build` 16/16; `pnpm format:check` clean; `pnpm keel-invariants:check-all` exit 0 (17-entry manifest walk + emitter `--check` — AC 4 live verification); `pnpm exec prek run --all-files` 5/5 hooks pass (typecheck + lint + format-check + tokens-schema + tokens-contrast — AC 5 live verification); Story 1.12 spec-file v1.5 Change Log row + iter-70 File List diff (AC 6 DEFER absorption). AUTHORING-HALF substrate evidence (AC 2-specific): Story 1.13 MUTATED `tokens.json` per § AC 2 carve-out — `color.accent.500` 54%→50%, `color.accent.600` 46%→42%, `color.status.info.fg` 52%→42%, `color.status.warning.fg` 58%→44%, dark-mode overlay additions for `$modes.dark.color.{status.*.fg, text.accent, border.accent, severity.*, state.*}` — so the contrast gate passes clean on the authored state (no chicken-and-egg violation of NFR27 fail-closed contract). Story 1.11 iter-59 CR defers #1–#5 (contrast + gamut) + Story 1.12 iter-66 CR defers AA1/AA2/AA3 + #4/#5/#6/#7/#9 absorbed at prescribed sites per spec AC 6. FR14n ATDD-skip precedent applied at iter-69 on hybrid-ground-(c) variant-(ii)+(iii) rationale (substrate-verification-covers-AC + no-runner + Story 1.16 backfill + CR fan-out adversarial cover); trace gate mirrors that decision — **SEVENTH CUMULATIVE WAIVED PRECEDENT** for contract-only / contract-populator / data-only / emitter+tooling / gate-authoring substrate stories (Stories 1.7 + 1.8 + 1.9 + 1.10 + 1.11 + 1.12 + 1.13). Implementation-time deviation from spec pair-enumeration (iter-70 Debug Log, NOT a gap): `border.default × surface.*` pairs DROPPED from contrast gate table (decorative separator between same-family surfaces is not a WCAG 1.4.11 UI-component; `border.accent × surface.*` retained at 3.0 threshold as focus indicator per 1.4.11). State/text/severity enumerations aligned with actual `tokens.json` keys (4 states; no `text.tertiary`/`disabled`; no `surface.invert`). Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Stories 1.11 + 1.12 (~90% reasoning-cost savings per iter-46 + iter-57 + iter-64 precedent).
